title: Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked

seo.title: How to Make Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked — Easy American Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked. This easy American recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

seo.imageAlt: Authentic American Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked — a beloved American classic

description: This classic Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked is the ultimate comfort food, featuring tender pasta enveloped in a rich, creamy cheese sauce and topped with a golden, crispy crust. It is a beloved American staple, perfect for family dinners or potlucks, offering a delightful blend of textures and savory flavors in every bite.

instructions.title: Prepare Pasta and Oven
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C). Lightly grease a 9x13 inch baking dish with butter. Cook the elbow macaroni according to package directions until it is al dente. Drain the pasta well and set it aside.

instructions.title: Make the Roux
instructions.text: In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, melt the 1/2 cup of unsalted butter over medium heat. Once melted, add the all-purpose flour and whisk continuously for 1-2 minutes to create a smooth roux. It should be light golden in color.

instructions.title: Whisk in Milk
instructions.text: Gradually whisk in the warmed whole milk, a little at a time, ensuring there are no lumps. Continue to whisk until the sauce thickens and begins to simmer, about 5-7 minutes. Keep the heat at medium-low to prevent scorching.

instructions.title: Add Cheeses and Seasonings
instructions.text: Remove the saucepan from the heat. Add 3 cups of the shredded sharp cheddar cheese and all of the shredded Gruyere cheese to the sauce. Stir until the cheeses are completely melted and the sauce is smooth and creamy. Season with salt, black pepper, and a pinch of nutmeg.

instructions.title: Combine Pasta and Sauce
instructions.text: Add the cooked and drained macaroni to the cheese sauce. Stir gently until all the pasta is evenly coated with the rich, creamy cheese sauce. Ensure every piece is covered for maximum flavor.

instructions.title: Bake to Golden Perfection
instructions.text: Pour the macaroni and cheese mixture into the prepared baking dish. Sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of shredded sharp cheddar cheese evenly over the top, followed by the Panko breadcrumbs. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and bubbly. Let it rest for a few minutes before serving.

tips: For the creamiest sauce, use freshly shredded cheese rather than pre-shredded, as the latter often contains anti-caking agents that can make the sauce gritty.
Experiment with different cheese combinations; smoked gouda, fontina, or even a touch of cream cheese can add unique depth and flavor.
Allow the baked mac and cheese to rest for 10-15 minutes after removing it from the oven. This helps the sauce set and prevents it from being too runny when served.
article: Homemade Mac and Cheese Baked is a beloved American Pasta and Noodles dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
